arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Sir Jim Ratcliffe's criticism of Man Utd players
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim speaks to the media for the first time since Sir Jim Ratcliffe's bombshell comments about the state of Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'Underperforming' Man Utd can change Ratcliffe's mind - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says "underperforming" squad can change Sir Jim Ratcliffe's opinion.

arts.ttl: Watch: Man Utd release images of new stadium
arts.sum: Look at plans for Manchester United's new stadium as they aim to build an "iconic" new 100,000-seater ground close to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Watch: Iconic Man Utd goals at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Watch the best goals scored by Manchester United at Old Trafford, as the club announces plans to move into a new stadium.

arts.ttl: 'I've always felt supported' - Amorim on Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim says he has always felt supported by the club's co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe and also gives thoughts on the club's new stadium plans.

arts.ttl: Man United given green light to complete '£35m' transfer for striker after Arsenal failure
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal have both previously been linked with a move for Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic.

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Everton's 'Siamese-style' ground, Chelsea's bid to reignite Battersea and Barcelona's Mediterranean marvel... crazy stadium plans that were NEVER built, as Man United unveil £2bn 'umbrella' arena
arts.sum: The world's eyes have been drawn to Manchester United's new £2billion stadium plan since the club's announcement this week.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano opens up on Paul Pogba and Man United
arts.sum: Recent speculation linking Paul Pogba with a shock return to Manchester United has been firmly shut down, with the club having no plans to re-sign their former midfielder, according to reports. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool, Tottenham and Man United among clubs offered winger once deemed 'the best in the world' out wide
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Liverpool, Tottenham Hotspur, Manchester United and Arsenal have all been offered the opportunity to sign Leroy Sane. All four...

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan challenges Sir Jim Ratcliffe on Man United transfer claim with Joshua Zirkzee point
arts.sum: The former Crystal Palace owner has questioned a number of key aspects of the plans for a new stadium
